name: Habibi 2D1N
description: Embark on an unforgettable sailing adventure with Habibi, perfect for those seeking a budget-friendly and social experience. This 2-day, 1-night tour takes you through the stunning Whitsunday Islands, offering a vibrant mix of relaxation and excitement. Ideal for backpackers, solo travelers, or groups of friends, you'll enjoy fresh meals prepared onboard and the freedom to bring your own drinks. Discover the beauty of the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park with snorkeling opportunities, and unwind under the stars in a relaxed and social setting.
departure_times: Departs: 8:30am - Wed, Fri | Returns: 4:00pm - Thu, Sat
includes:
All meals prepared on board
Fresh, clean linen
Snorkelling gear and tutorials
Marine Park fees
BYO soft drinks and alcohol (no glass or red wine)
Spacious open plan/dorm style cabins
Eskies for drinks
highlights:
Sail through the beautiful Whitsunday Islands
Snorkelling in the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park
Social and exciting trip ideal for young travelers
Relaxed evenings under the stars
BYO alcohol with provided eskies
Private and shared cabin options
price_tiers: Shared Single (Nov-Jan): A$449 | Shared Double (Nov-Jan): A$838 (for 2 people) | Private Double Cabin (Nov-Jan): A$968 (for 2 people) | Private Twin Cabin (Nov-Jan): A$968 (for 2 people)
ideal_for: Backpackers, solo travelers, and groups of friends seeking a social and budget-friendly sailing adventure
